pages.title: 🏁 What is Animal Racing?
pages.description:
Animal Racing is Veyra’s gambling mini-game where **three animals** race to the finish line and players **bet gold** to win more gold.

Competitors:
🐇 **Rabbit** • 🐢 **Turtle** • 🦊 **Fox**

It’s RNG. There is no skill. The only strategy is pretending you’re not addicted.

fields.name: Quick Commands
fields.value:
• `/start_race` - Start a new race (opens betting phase)
• `!bet <animal> <amount>` - Place your bet

Examples:
`!bet fox 200`
`!bet rabbit 50`

fields.name: Key Rules
fields.value:
• **1 bet per user per race**
• Gold is deducted instantly
• Bets lock when betting phase ends

pages.title: 🕒 Starting a Race + Betting
pages.description:
A race begins when someone uses `/start_race`.

This triggers a **3-minute betting phase** where anyone can place a bet.

fields.name: Start Race
fields.value:
Use: `/start_race`

• Betting phase lasts **3 minutes**
• After it ends, the race starts automatically

fields.name: Betting Protocol
fields.value:
• Only these animals: `rabbit`, `turtle`, `fox`
• Changing/canceling a bet is **not allowed**
• Insufficient gold = bet fails

pages.title: 🏎️ Race Mechanics
pages.description:
Once betting locks, the race begins and updates live via embed.

**Track:** 30 tiles
**Movement:** each tick, every animal moves **randomly 1–4 tiles**
**Update speed:** ~every few seconds (embed refresh)

fields.name: How Winner is Determined
fields.value:
• First animal to cross tile 30 wins
• In rare ties, the first animal registered as crossing is the winner

fields.name: Commentary
fields.value:
Veyra may send hype messages during the race.
They’re **aesthetic only** and do not affect outcomes.

pages.title: 💰 Payouts + Cooldowns
pages.description: When the race ends, winnings are distributed to everyone who bet on the winning animal.

fields.name: Payout Formula
fields.value:
Winners split **90%** of the pool proportionally:

`payout = (your_bet / total_bets_on_winner) × (total_pool × 0.9)`

Veyra keeps **10%** as a system fee (capitalism moment).

fields.name: Edge Cases
fields.value:
• If nobody bet on the winner → **no payouts**
• If no bets were placed → race still runs, but no rewards
• After race → bet data resets automatically

fields.name: Cooldown
fields.value: • **15 minutes** cooldown between races per guild

fields.name: Tips
fields.value:
• All animals are statistically equal.
• Don’t chase losses.
• If you’re down bad, go do `/work` instead of speedrunning bankruptcy.
